source: Exhibit G — State Specific Addenda (Depth Pass 4)

overrides.override_summary: CFA has 60-day right of first refusal to purchase franchise interest — not in base FA
overrides.why_it_matters: Gives CFA ability to match any third-party offer, effectively preventing independent sale

overrides.override_summary: Integration clause cannot disclaim California Franchise Investment Law or Relations Act protections
overrides.why_it_matters: Representations made by CFA during sales process may be enforceable even if not in FA

overrides.override_summary: Post-term noncompete may be unenforceable under California Business & Professions Code §16600
overrides.why_it_matters: CA operators may be free to compete immediately after termination despite FA language

overrides.override_summary: Illinois Franchise Disclosure Act may allow litigation in Illinois
overrides.why_it_matters: Operator may not be forced to litigate in Georgia

overrides.override_summary: Illinois law may apply to franchise relationship
overrides.why_it_matters: Illinois franchise protections may override Georgia law provisions

overrides.override_summary: Maryland Franchise Registration and Disclosure Law may impose good cause termination requirements
overrides.why_it_matters: CFA's without-cause termination right may be limited in Maryland
Initial fees may need to be escrowed until opening
Post-term noncompete may be narrower or unenforceable

overrides.override_summary: Minnesota franchise law may impose good cause and notice requirements
overrides.why_it_matters: CFA's without-cause termination may be restricted

overrides.override_summary: New York franchise law protections may apply
overrides.why_it_matters: Additional notice and cure period requirements

overrides.override_summary: North Dakota generally prohibits noncompete agreements
overrides.why_it_matters: Both during-term and post-term noncompetes may be unenforceable

overrides.override_summary: Georgia venue clause may be overridden
overrides.why_it_matters: ND operator may be able to litigate locally

overrides.override_summary: Virginia Retail Franchising Act provides additional protections
overrides.why_it_matters: Notice and cure period requirements may differ from FA

overrides.override_summary: Washington Franchise Investment Protection Act provisions apply
overrides.why_it_matters: Good cause requirements for termination and non-renewal

overrides.override_summary: Wisconsin Fair Dealership Law provides additional protections
overrides.why_it_matters: Good cause required for termination; notice and cure periods may differ; applicable as this is the filing state
